notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes mostly visible/ordinary events: Fang Yuan's time-path clone and subordinates building an array, refining immortal gu, capturing and processing prisoners (Yang Ku), and managing Xiao Nanjiang. These are presented as open actions by Fang Yuan and his faction, not as hidden knowledge.

The only potentially non-obvious item is that Fang Yuan's pure dream truth body was learned from Feng Jinhuang in his previous life (ch_1795_p0025), but this is background knowledge already known to Fang Yuan himself, not a hidden fact about the current timeline that other actors are unaware of.
No directly supported knowledge gap, secret plan/motive, or future-known information is clearly evidenced in the seed paragraphs.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

Seed primarily describes actions (方源盗取仙蛊、处理俘虏、搭建阵法) but does not provide direct evidence of character motives (desires, fears, bottomLine). Observed actions are visible but underlying motives are ambiguous - could be resource accumulation, power growth, or strategic preparation. No direct source text supports inferring specific motives like '示好', '投靠', or strategic intent. Only behavior is visible; motive is ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed focuses on Fang Yuan (individual) capturing and processing Southern Border Gu Immortals (Yang Ku, Xia Cha, etc.) as individuals. No named collective faction/clan/family with a concrete stake in the seed facts is clearly identified as a pressure subject. 'Shadow Sect' (影宗) is mentioned only as Fang Yuan's title (影宗宗主) with no further faction activity. 'Yang family' (羊家) is mentioned once identifying Yang Ku but no collective stake or reaction is shown. The captured individuals are not linked to any organized collective response in this chapter.
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
